LanguageData.DW_Purgatus_ForceStaff.label: Rifthaven Mk II Purgatus Force Staff
LanguageData.DW_Purgatus_ForceStaff.description: The Inquisitor leads the way with words of benevolence, his force staff held like a symbol of faith. But make no mistake: they are no shepherds of the meek. They are destroyers of worlds. - High Ecclesiarch Renald Kothar.
LanguageData.DW_Voidstrike_ForceStaff.label: Equinox Mk IV Voidstrike Force Staff
LanguageData.DW_Voidstrike_ForceStaff.description: This pattern of stave allows the wielder to create a great blaze bolt projectile that deals high damage and can pass through crowds in a great line of destruction.
LanguageData.DW_Electrokinetic_ForceStaff.label: Nomanus Mk VI Electrokinetic Force Staff
LanguageData.DW_Electrokinetic_ForceStaff.description: A Force Staff grounds a Psyker, helping them resist daemonic possession.
LanguageData.DW_VoidBlast_ForceStaff.label: Equinox Mk III Voidblast Force Staff
LanguageData.DW_VoidBlast_ForceStaff.description: Through the intricate psi-convectors of a force staff, a psyker harnesses the pure energy of the Warp, unleashing it upon their enemies in ferocious psychic cavalcades.
